title: Food, hazard, sleep, and inspection first-run path
manual_graphics_note: The default tutorial path is headless. Graphics/Bevy demos remain optional/manual.

steps.title: Start a deterministic tiny world
steps.goal: Confirm the CPU/headless path runs without GPU, Bevy graphics, semantic provider, or school UI.
steps.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --bin p35_playground -- run-headless crates/alife_world/tests/fixtures/p34
steps.expected_signal: sealed patch and packed log counts are reported

steps.title: Exercise survival outcomes
steps.goal: See food reward, missing affordance failure, hazard pain, and rest/sleep as sealed outcomes.
steps.expected_signal: food, hazard, and sleep events appear without unsealed learning

steps.title: Inspect a stable creature snapshot
steps.goal: Use inspector output as read-only context over stable IDs and sealed patch summaries.
steps.command: cargo run -p alife_game_app --bin alife_game_app -- creature-inspector-smoke crates/alife_world/tests/fixtures/p34
steps.expected_signal: selected creature, action, drives, and troubleshooting messages are reported

steps.title: Read the balance summary
steps.goal: Check first-pass long-run metrics and known degenerate behavior notes.
steps.expected_signal: survival, energy, food, hazard, sleep, reproduction, and social metrics are reported

steps.title: Validate example manifest paths
steps.goal: Catch missing or stale files before trying optional demos.
steps.command: cargo run -p alife_tools --bin p35_playground -- validate-manifest examples/p35/playground_manifest.json
steps.expected_signal: manifest path and manual optional command counts are reported
